password.description: User password — min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, digit, special char
User password — min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, digit, special char

receiver_name.description: Name of the person receiving shipment

isNewUser.description: Whether this is a new user (for OAuth signups)

cardNames.description: Optional array of card names for better matching

tcg_id.description: TCG ID (UUID). If not provided, defaults to Magic
TCG ID (UUID). If not provided, defaults to Magic

products.description: Array of single products to create

tcg_id.description: TCG ID (UUID). If not provided, defaults to Magic

singleId.description: Local product ID (required if isImportation is false)

isImportation.description: Whether the product is from Importation source

importationId.description: Importation product ID (required if isImportation is true)

productData.description: Product data (required only for Importation products, should contain at least: name, importationId, language, foil)

tcgId.description: TCG ID associated with the product

items.description: List of items to merge into the user cart

quantity.description: New quantity for the cart item

shippingMethod.description: Shipping method: arrange (with seller) or shipping (to address)

addressId.description: Address ID (required if shippingMethod is shipping)

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: transfer, mercadopago, wallet or googlepay

paymentToken.description: Payment token for Google Pay (required if paymentMethod is googlepay)

walletAmount.description: Amount to pay from wallet balance (required for wallet_plus_mercadopago and wallet_plus_transfer)

itemIds.description: List of cart item IDs to include in the order (if empty, all items will be included)

productId.description: ID of the product (Single ID or Importation ID)

userId.description: User ID to create order for

importOrderedAt.description: Date when Importation import was ordered

notes.description: Internal admin notes for this order

isImportation.description: Whether the item is from Importation (optional, default false)

cardName.description: Card name for Importation lookup optimization

productData.description: Product data (fallback if live lookup fails). Should contain: name, price, imageUrl, url, stock, etc.

deliveredQuantity.description: Number of units to deliver (for partial delivery)

content.example: What cards do you have in stock?
